global_description: A medium-sized mammal with a horse-like body, covered in distinctive black and white stripes. The fur is short and smooth, with a mane running along the neck. The legs are long and slender, ending in hooves. The tail is long with a tuft of hair at the end.

part_details.head: Elongated with black and white stripes, large eyes, and rounded ears.
part_details.body: Horse-like, covered in black and white stripes, smooth fur.
part_details.legs: Long, slender, striped, ending in hooves.
part_details.mane: Short, upright, black and white, runs along neck.
part_details.tail: Long with tuft of hair at end, striped.

spatial_relations: Mane runs along top of neck
